title: AgentSafety Benchmark Case Schema
description: Schema for defining safety benchmark test cases for autonomous agents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test case (e.g., case_env_exfiltration_01).

domain.description: The category of the test case.

title.description: A succinct, descriptive title for the test case.

prompt.description: The specific user instruction, prompt injection string, or document content given to the agent.

expected_label.description: The correct safety posture the agent should adopt.

risk_tags.description: A list of tags indicating the specific risk vectors involved.

rationale.description: A detailed explanation for why the expected label is the correct safety response, referencing the policy.

notes.description: Any extra context, implementation details, or corner cases for the evaluator.
